title: Set up an Embedded onramp integration
excerpt: Use this guide to fully customize the embeddable onramp. This guide is an extended version of the [Embedded onramp quickstart](https://docs.stripe.com/crypto/onramp/embedded-quickstart.md). Learn to add more functionality such as how to: - Install the SDK using a script tag or package manager - Configure the onramp UI into mobile web views - Handle customer supportability and fraud - Fetch estimated cryptocurrency conversion quotes
